prose.overview: Sriracha International Golf Club is an 18-hole, par-72 course designed by Gary Player and set in the hilly terrain of Laem Chabang, Sriracha, approximately 30 minutes from central Pattaya. The Player design stretches to 7,019 yards from the championship tees — a substantial length that the hilly, undulating terrain amplifies into a genuine test of shot-making. The course has twice served as a Thai Open venue, a distinction shared with only a small number of courses in the eastern region and one that attests to its conditioning standards and competitive layout. Green fees and contact details were not confirmed in web searches; verify current pricing before booking.
prose.layout_and_experience: Gary Player's design philosophy consistently emphasises strategic challenge over raw difficulty — and Sriracha International reflects this in the way the hilly Laem Chabang terrain is used. Elevation changes are built into the routing rather than worked around, creating downhill approach shots, uphill tee shots, and lies that require different ball trajectories than the flat courses that dominate the Pattaya region. The par-4 holes are notably demanding despite many being shorter than par on comparable flat layouts — the Chonburi hills shorten carry distances and create gusting wind corridors that affect club selection. Having hosted the Thai Open twice, the course has been prepared for professional-level scoring, which means the conditioning and difficulty are calibrated for a more skilled player audience than pure holiday-resort courses.
prose.tips: Sriracha International is near Laem Chabang International Country Club — both are in the same hilly Sriracha coastal zone, making a two-course day practical for golfers visiting the area. The hilly terrain makes walking difficult; confirm cart availability and pricing when booking. The Thai Open heritage adds interest for golf history enthusiasts who want to play a course with competitive credentials. Green fee information was not available in web searches — contact the club directly or book through a Pattaya golf agent to confirm current pricing and tee times. The course does not appear to have an active official website.
prose.location_and_access: Sriracha International Golf Club is located in the Laem Chabang area of Sriracha, Chonburi, approximately 120km southeast of central Bangkok and 30 minutes from central Pattaya. The drive from Bangkok takes around 90 minutes via the Bang Na–Trat Expressway (Highway 7). The course sits close to Laem Chabang International Country Club in the same hilly coastal zone north of Pattaya. Grab and pre-arranged transfers from Pattaya or Bangkok hotels are the standard options.
prose.rental_cta_context: Playing a Gary Player design at Sriracha International? Rent clubs from LENGOLF — the hilly terrain demands a set you can rely on for accurate distance control.
